posts.author: crowsfury
posts.title: Michigan Dem Senate candidate Abdul El-Sayed supports defunding the police but deleted his tweets. “The police have become standing armies we deploy against our own people. Do police really need to use guns? Defunding the police is disinvesting in the means of incarcerating someone or killing them."

link_metadata.description: Michigan Democratic Senate front-runner Abdul El-Sayed has faced criticism for previous comments he’s made about defunding the police. In recent interviews, El-Sayed has insisted he “never, never called for defunding” the police. But interviews from 2020 show El-Sayed repeatedly endorsed defunding the police
link_metadata.title: ‘We do need to defund the police’: 2020 interviews undermine Abdul El-Sayed’s claim he never advocated for unpopular movement | CNN Politics

posts.raw_content:
Complete diplomatic collapse.  US President Donald Trump declared that the recent US-Iran ceasefire had collapsed. The U.S. military launched fresh retaliatory strikes against Iran and revoked a temporary sanctions waiver that permitted Tehran to export oil.

Now all Trump needs to do is make sure the cleanup is done before September's hard run to midterm elections.  If not, midterms will be a real loser for the GOP.

No more waiting until weekends for attacks, whether up or down, the Friday close of the  markets don't matter now, they can fall without any worries, crude prices will rise again, Hormuz closed and ships taking hits.  Bahrain under attack from Iran, back to deep state actions as the norm.
